推荐场景: 研讨室白板前｜听懂背景说明
60秒任务: 「说明背景」：定义/背景/例子/结论；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 定义｜结构化说明｜例证｜比较｜结论｜笔记抓取
场景族: 课堂｜研讨室｜讲座｜访谈｜白板说明
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
To understand this, we need some background.（引入背景）
For context, ___ happened before ___.（补充语境）
The issue started when ___.（说明起点）
One important factor was ___.（指出因素）
The key change was ___.（说明转折）
This matters because ___.（解释重要性）
At the time, people were concerned about ___.（历史语境）
The background helps explain why ___.（连接背景与原因）
There are two main reasons behind this.（结构化原因）
First, ___. Then, ___.（时间顺序）
It didn’t happen suddenly; it developed over time.（说明渐变过程）
The speaker is setting up the main argument.（识别演讲结构）
I missed the background detail about ___.（笔记缺口）
Can you repeat the part about ___?（请求重复）
So the timeline is: ___, then ___, then ___.（整理时间线）
That background changes how we interpret ___.（背景影响理解）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: background, context, timeline, factor, cause, trend
Verbs: explain, develop, influence, set up, lead to, shape
Adjectives: historical, recent, gradual, sudden, important, relevant
Time: before, after, at the time, over time, first, then
Chunks: for context, main reason, key change, underlying factor, developed over time, set up the argument
